name: assetlink-supabase
description: AssetLink is a school asset management and QR-enabled repair tracking web app for Philippine public schools under DepEd.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix dashboard && npx pnpm --dir landing install
scripts.supabase:gen: supabase gen types typescript --project-id nqdxmhagarofkdqtwohj > dashboard/src/types/supabase.ts && copy /Y dashboard\src\types\supabase.ts landing\lib\supabase-types.ts
